skipped.message: Canon EDSDK requires developer access and native driver implementation.
Nikon SDK requires developer approval and native driver implementation.
ConformU must be installed and run against ASCOM/Alpaca simulators.; required tool `ConformU` was not found
target is not applicable to windows
Native Celestron AUX/CPWI support is not implemented.
Native Pegasus Powerbox support is not implemented.
